documents.title: Kubernetes Pod Scheduling Deep Dive
documents.summary: A comprehensive look at how Kubernetes schedules pods across nodes, including affinity rules, taints, tolerations, and resource requests.

documents.title: GitHub Copilot Instructions Deep Dive
documents.summary: How to write effective .github/copilot-instructions.md files, custom agents, and skill definitions for GitHub Copilot.

documents.title: Distributed Systems: CAP Theorem
documents.summary: The CAP theorem states that a distributed system can only guarantee two of three properties: Consistency, Availability, and Partition tolerance.

documents.title: Git Rebase vs Merge Strategy
documents.summary: When to use git rebase versus git merge, and how each strategy affects your commit history and team workflow.

documents.title: TypeScript Generic Constraints
documents.summary: Advanced TypeScript generic patterns including conditional types, mapped types, and template literal types for building flexible type-safe APIs.
